definition: solid defined by sweeping the area of a circle (the generatrix) along a larger circle (the directrix)

definition_ml.en: solid defined by sweeping the area of a circle (the generatrix) along a larger circle (the directrix)

note: NOTE 1  The major radius shall be greater than the minor radius.||NOTE 2  The location of the central point on the axis and the direction of the axis define the centre and plane of the directrix.||NOTE 3  The property axis1_placement3d specifies the local coordinate system of the torus whereas the property location specifies the position of the origin of the local coordinate system within the geometric context.

note_ml.en: NOTE 1  The major radius shall be greater than the minor radius.||NOTE 2  The location of the central point on the axis and the direction of the axis define the centre and plane of the directrix.||NOTE 3  The property axis1_placement3d specifies the local coordinate system of the torus whereas the property location specifies the position of the origin of the local coordinate system within the geometric context.

raw_properties.MDC_P008.en: NOTE 1  The major radius shall be greater than the minor radius.||NOTE 2  The location of the central point on the axis and the direction of the axis define the centre and plane of the directrix.||NOTE 3  The property axis1_placement3d specifies the local coordinate system of the torus whereas the property location specifies the position of the origin of the local coordinate system within the geometric context.
